description: You are an epidemiologist analyzing the 2017-2018 National Health and Nutrition Examination Survey (NHANES) data. Using Epi Info 7 Classic Analysis, perform a one-way ANOVA to determine if there is a significant difference in mean Systolic BP (BPXSY1) across four BMI categories (BMICAT: 1=Underweight, 2=Normal, 3=Overweight, 4=Obese) using the dataset at C:\Users\Docker\Documents\EpiProjects\NhanesExam\BPStudy.csv. Create a summary text file at C:\Users\Docker\Documents\anova_results.txt containing exactly five lines with the following numeric values: Line 1: The ANOVA F-statistic; Line 2: The ANOVA p-value; Line 3: The Kruskal-Wallis H statistic; Line 4: The mean systolic BP for the Obese group (BMICAT=4); Line 5: The total number of valid observations used.
